RTN | Speech, Language & Literacy

Clinical Tools

Free, evidence-based digital tools for SLPs, educators, and clinicians. No accounts, no tracking — everything runs in your browser.

By Rachel Terra Norton, MS, CCC-SLP
Viridis
Literacy
📚
Session Planning
Literacy Session Builder
Build structured-literacy session plans with live data collection across sound, word, and text levels.
📖 Structured Literacy
📖
Simulation
Dyslexia Simulation
Experience what reading feels like for students with dyslexia. Three interactive distortion modes with guided reflection.
🧠 Empathy Builder
🔤
Practice
Sight Word Flashcards
First 100 sight words with Montessori grammar color coding. Based on Green et al., 2024.
🎨 Montessori
🔍
Game
Mystery Letter Game
Interactive letter identification and phonics game for early readers.
🎮 Early Literacy
📝
Vocabulary
Word Collector
Collect, categorize, and explore vocabulary words across contexts.
📚 Language
🔬
Morphology
Word Scientist
Break words into morphemes — prefixes, roots, and suffixes. Build morphological awareness.
🧩 Word Study
🕵️
Phonics
Pattern Detective
Identify and practice spelling patterns across word families and syllable types.
🔡 Decoding
⏱️
Fluency
Fluency Lab
Oral reading fluency practice and progress monitoring with built-in timing.
📈 Progress
🗣️
Phonics
Phonics Friend
Interactive phonics instruction and practice for emerging readers.
🔊 Sound-Symbol
Spectral
Social
🧩
PDA Intervention
The Autonomy-First Toolkit
PDA-profile intervention planner with declarative language swaps, CPS Plan B, Unstuck & On Target, and interoception activities.
🤝 Neurodiversity-Affirming
📋
Social-Communication
SCDFI
Social-Communication & Developmental Functioning Inventory. Multi-informant assessment across social, pragmatic, and adaptive domains.
📊 Multi-Informant
Plasma
Assessment / Intake / Eval
📋
Student Intake
Student Self-Report Intake
Neurodiversity-affirming, strengths-based student self-report intake form for SLPs and reading specialists.
💜 Strengths-Based
📝
Intake Forms
Evaluation Intake Forms
Trauma-informed parent/caregiver and teacher/educator intake forms for speech-language evaluation.
🏥 Clinical
🧪
Evaluation
SLP Evaluation Wizard
Full SLP evaluation report builder with structured sections for assessment, analysis, and recommendations.
📄 Report Builder
📈
Benchmark
CUBED-3 Benchmark Report
Dynamic Decoding Measures benchmark scoring, progress visualization, and narrative-language analysis.
📊 Score Report
🔠
Assessment
CORE Phonics Survey
Score report for alphabetic knowledge, reading, and spelling subtests with visual skill mapping.
📊 Score Report
🎯
Assessment
PAST Score Report
Phonological Awareness Screening Test — scoring, analysis, and phonological awareness profiling.
📊 Score Report
Cividis
Other
🧠
Education
Brain Pathways
Interactive brain diagram showing overlapping neural networks of reading, learning, and trauma response.
🔬 Neuroscience
🌱
Trauma-Informed
Trauma-Informed Activity Planner
Adapt classroom and therapy activities through a trauma-informed lens using SAMHSA principles and DIR/Floortime.
🛡️ SAMHSA
🌍
Systems Mapping
Ecological Systems & Trauma Explorer
Map trauma across Bronfenbrenner's ecological systems and identify effects on learning and development.
🗺️ Ecological
📘
Reference
Reading Research Guide
Curated guide to reading research, resources, and evidence-based practices for clinicians and educators.
📚 Reference
RTN | Speech, Language & Literacy
Rachel Terra Norton, MS, CCC-SLP · rachelslp.org
All tools are free, open-source, and run entirely in your browser. No data is collected or transmitted.
Palettes: Viridis, Spectral, Plasma, Cividis — R diverging (colorblind-friendly)
